title: Reel
empty: No videos found on that page
profTagline: Paste any page URL and every video on it becomes a full-screen, auto-scrolling reel — the next pages load themselves as you swipe.
installDesc: Works offline, opens as an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
